evaluation.overall_comment:
The translation successfully covers the full length and content of the original English podcast dialogue, preserving the flow of ideas and technical concepts. However, it is severely undermined by pervasive orthographic errors and typos that appear on almost every line. These flaws critically damage readability, fluency, and technical presentation, making the text difficult to read and unprofessional for educational or scientific use.
